product_overview: StyleAI is an AI-powered e-commerce web app that helps users discover and purchase fashion through personalized recommendations, powerful browsing filters, and a streamlined multi-step checkout. It pairs modern UI/UX with local state management to simulate a responsive boutique shopping experience.
core_goals: Enable fast, intuitive product discovery with robust filtering and view modes.
Provide frictionless variant selection and cart management with real-time UI feedback.
Deliver a secure-feeling, validated multi-step checkout flow with clear order confirmation.
Offer an AI-driven style quiz to generate personalized product recommendations.
Maintain high performance, accessibility, and responsive design across devices.

features.name: Product Listing & Discovery
features.description: Browse, filter, sort and switch view modes for products; navigate to product details for purchase.
user_flows: Navigate to /products -> See skeleton loaders while products fetch -> Select a category filter (e.g., Women's Fashion) -> Adjust price range to $0 - $150 -> Toggle view to List view -> Click a product card -> Navigate to /products/[id]

Navigate to /products -> Select Category and Brand filters that yield no matches -> See empty state message with Clear Filters action -> Click Clear Filters -> See product grid repopulate with results
Navigate to /products -> Toggle between Grid and List views -> Observe layout change without page reload -> Click sorting dropdown -> Select 'Price: Low to High' -> See product order update

features.name: Add to Cart & Cart Management
features.description: Select required product variants (size, color), add items to a persistent cart, and view updates in a real-time CartDrawer.
user_flows: Navigate to /products/[id] -> Select size variant -> Select color variant -> Click Add to Cart button -> See CartDrawer slide in from the right -> See toast notification confirming item added -> See cart subtotal and free-shipping progress update

Navigate to /products/[id] -> Attempt to Click Add to Cart button without selecting size -> See inline validation error 'Please select a size' -> Remain on product page until required variants selected
Navigate to /products/[id] -> Select size and color -> Click Add to Cart button -> See CartDrawer -> Increment item quantity in CartDrawer -> See subtotal update accordingly

features.name: Checkout Process
features.description: A multi-step checkout (shipping -> payment -> review) with validation, order summary, and a simulated confirmation state that clears the cart.
user_flows: Navigate to /cart -> Click Proceed to Checkout -> Navigate to /checkout -> Fill shipping information -> Click Continue to Payment -> Fill mock payment details -> Click Review Order -> Click Place Order -> See 'Processing...' state -> See order confirmation with confetti and order number -> See cart emptied
Navigate to /checkout -> Leave required shipping fields empty -> Click Continue to Payment -> See field-level validation errors -> Cannot progress to Payment until fields are valid

Navigate to /checkout -> Fill shipping information -> Click Continue to Payment -> Enter invalid mock credit card details -> Click Review Order -> See payment validation error -> Remain on Payment step to correct details

features.name: AI Style Quiz
features.description: A 10-step interactive quiz that analyzes user choices and returns personalized product recommendations powered by a simulated AI flow.
user_flows: Navigate to /style-quiz -> Click Start Quiz -> Select an image option for Step 1 -> Select image options through Step 10 (repeat selection for each step) -> See AI analyzing animation -> View personalized product recommendations -> Click a recommended item -> Navigate to /products/[id]
Navigate to /style-quiz -> Click Start Quiz -> On a required step do not select an option -> Click Next -> See inline validation 'Please select an option' -> Make a selection to continue

Navigate to /style-quiz -> Complete all selections -> See AI analyzing animation -> Simulated AI fails to generate personalized results -> See fallback 'Featured picks' recommendations -> Click a fallback product -> Navigate to /products/[id]

routes.description: Homepage with featured products, categories, and AI recommendations
Product listing page with filters and sorting
Product detail page with variants, gallery, and tabs
User dashboard for profile, orders, and wishlist

features.name: Product Discovery
features.description: Browse and filter products across various categories with grid/list views
user_interactions: Click a product card to view details

features.name: Add to Cart
features.description: Add products with specific size and color variants to the cart
user_interactions: View CartDrawer updating with the new item

features.name: Checkout Process
features.description: Complete purchase through a multi-step checkout form
user_interactions: See success confetti and order confirmation

features.name: AI Style Quiz
features.description: Complete a 10-step quiz to get personalized recommendations

known_limitations.issue: Local mocked data instead of real backend API
known_limitations.impact: Data is not persisted across hard reloads or shared across sessions, orders do not actually process charges.
No real user sign-up or JWT token validation.
